summary: OCB TITAN - Batch 4 Final Validation: RBAC, Stock Opname, AR Payment, DB Init. Backend: 22/22 tests PASSED. Frontend: Stock Opname ERPActionToolbar FIXED (was crashing), AR Payment dropdown shows Kas/Bank accounts correctly.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: React crash: 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {$$typeof, render})'. Caused by passing Lucide icon component directly instead of JSX.

context_for_next_testing_agent:
Batch 4 final validation completed successfully:

1. DATABASE INIT: Endpoint /api/system/init-check returns status:'ready' with all master data counts > 0.

2. RBAC OWNER: Owner (ocbgroupbjm@gmail.com) has ['*'] permissions and full sidebar access.

3. RBAC KASIR: Kasir (kasir_test@ocb.com) has limited permissions - can view products but cannot delete master data or edit settings.

4. STOCK OPNAME: ERPActionToolbar working with all standard buttons (Tambah Opname, Edit, Hapus, Print, Approve) plus 3 custom branch opname buttons. BUG FIXED: Icon rendering crash.

5. AR PAYMENT: Dropdown shows Kas, Kas Kecil, Bank BCA accounts. Validation prevents save without account selection.

NOTE: Stock Opname route is /inventory/opname (not /inventory/stock-opname)
